items.title: Monitoring started: Maine Judicial Branch Court Forms

page_lines: Court forms provided on this website are free to download, and are provided as PDF documents. To view PDF documents, you will need the free
Paper forms can be obtained from any clerk's office. Many paper forms are free. There is a $5 charge for some forms, such as a Summons, that require the clerk's signature and court seal.
Search the court forms database by clicking the button below. If you cannot locate a form contact

Court forms are revised by the Judicial Branch from time to time. The most up-to-date versions of forms are linked on this page. If a court form is required by Rule, Order, or Statute and an outdated version is submitted, it will not be docketed and will be returned as incomplete.
To avoid incomplete filings, use the most current version of the court form.
The following packets of forms have been assembled for convenience.
The following form packets include "A Guide to Protection from Abuse and Harassment Actions." If filing by email, download and complete the "For Email Filing" labeled packets.
For use when filing ELECTRONICALLY (eFiling or by email):
: Forms to file a Protection from Abuse
: Forms to file a Protection from Harassment
: Forms to file a Motion to Extend Order for Protection
For use when filing at IN PERSON at the courthouse:
: Forms to file a Protection from Abuse
: Forms to file Protection from Harassment
: Forms to file a Motion to Extend Order for Protection
Forms to file a Complaint for Divorce with Children
(PDF) (NOT included: FM-038 Family Matter Summons and Preliminary Injunction; this form must be obtained from a clerk's office for a $5.00 fee)
Forms to file a Complaint for Divorce without Children
(PDF) (NOT included: FM-038 Family Matter Summons and Preliminary Injunction; this form must be obtained from a clerk's office for a $5.00 fee)
Forms to file a Complaint for Parentage, Parental Rights & Responsibilities & Child Support
(PDF) (NOT included: FM-038 Family Matter Summons and Preliminary Injunction; this form must be obtained from a clerk's office for a $5.00 fee)
Forms to file a Motion to Modify
Forms to file a Motion to Enforce
Forms to file a Motion for Contempt
(PDF) (NOT included: CV-037 Subpoena for Hearing on Motion for Contempt; this form must be obtained from a clerk's office for a $5.00 fee, or issued and signed by an attorney.)
FED and Recovery of Personal Property
Forms to file a Residential FED
(PDF) (NOT included: CV-034 Forcible Entry and Detainer Summons; must be obtained from a clerk's office for a $5.00 fee)
Forms to file a Recovery of Personal Property case under the Phased Management Plan (PMP)
(PDF) (NOT included: CV-184 Recovery of Personal Property Summons; must be obtained from a clerk's office for a $5.00 fee)
Maine attorneys can submit a request to
to be sent blank fillable versions of the following forms via email:
Subpoena for Production of Documentary Evidence or Tangible Objects by a Nonparty (CR-213) Rev. 07/15
Subpoena for Attendance of Witness (CR-072) Rev. 03/21
be used to submit a request for the issuance of a subpoena under the Uniform Interstate Depositions and Discovery Act. See
Self-represented parties must purchase subpoenas from any clerk's office for a $5 fee (see
M.R.U. Crim. P. 17, and M.R.U. Crim. P. 17A
ADA: Grievance Form for Disability Request
